content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 20, 2026, focused on dependency management, infrastructure stability, and core functionality improvements. The team addressed critical memory handling in the database adapter and refined Discord routing for lifeops, while maintaining the framework's modularity through extensive package updates.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Dependency Updates and Infrastructure Maintenance**
*   Updated various core dependencies to ensure compatibility and security, including `@coral-xyz/borsh` ([#6958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6958)), `gymnasium` ([#6952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6952)), and `com.android.tools.build:gradle` ([#6951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6951)).
*   Performed routine maintenance on SDKs and tools, including Uniswap v2/v3 SDKs ([#6956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6956), [#6955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6955)), `@types/node` ([#6954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6954)), and the Capacitor monorepo ([#6957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6957)).
*   Updated Supabase/Postgres docker tags ([#6959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6959)) and Rust WASM-bindgen monorepo ([#6949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6949)).

**Core Logic and Application Improvements**
*   Fixed `InMemoryDatabaseAdapter.updateMemories` to correctly handle `roomId` changes, ensuring memories are properly moved between room lists ([#6965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6965)).
*   Resolved Discord routing issues for lifeops and performed submodule bumps ([#6971](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6971)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6983](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6983): fix(claude-code-stealth): detect CLI version at runtime.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Merxex Integration Proposals**
*   Closed multiple redundant proposals regarding the integration of the Merxex AI agent-to-agent commerce platform ([#6961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6961), [#6966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6966), [#6967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6967)).

## NEW ISSUES

**Agent Commerce Integration**
*   [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6977): A proposal for standardizing agent commerce via Merxex integration was submitted.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None.*
